title: Tangent line as h → 0
description: The derivative is the slope of the tangent line. Drag h to watch the secant collapse into the tangent at the anchor point.

fallback.alt_text: Plot of y = x squared on x ∈ [-2, 3]. The tangent line at x = 1 has slope 2; secant lines drawn for h = 1, 0.5, 0.1 visibly converge to the tangent as h shrinks.
